reviewStateSchema.description: Persistent review pipeline state tracking which stages are complete

readReviewState.description: Reads the review state for a set, returns null if no review has started

writeReviewState.description: Atomically writes updated review state for a set

markStageComplete.signature: markStageComplete(setId: string, stage: 'scope' | 'unit-test' | 'bug-hunt' | 'uat', verdict: string): void
markStageComplete.description: Records a review stage as completed with its verdict

atomicWrites.description: REVIEW-STATE.json is written using temp-file-then-rename pattern consistent with STATE.json and MERGE-STATE.json

prerequisiteEnforcement.description: UAT stage refuses to run if unit-test stage has not completed; bug-hunt and unit-test can run in any order after scope

idempotentReEntry.description: If a review stage has already been completed, the skill prompts to re-run or skip rather than failing

definition.scope: Implement persistent review state so the review pipeline tracks which stages have been completed per set, enabling skip and resume behavior across separate command invocations.

tasks.description: Define REVIEW-STATE.json Zod schema and read/write functions
tasks.acceptance: Schema validates correctly with roundtrip tests

tasks.description: Implement stage completion recording in review library

tasks.acceptance: UAT blocked without unit-test; scope required first

tasks.description: Update review skill and downstream skills to read/write state
tasks.acceptance: Skills detect completed stages and offer skip/re-run

tasks.description: Add CLI subcommand for review state inspection
tasks.acceptance: User can view review progress per set

acceptance: REVIEW-STATE.json created and managed per set
